npcs.name: Ray
npcs.voice: Street wisdom. One to two sentences. Never says 'great job' unless rep 6+.
fallback_bank: Street doesn't care about your plans.
Keep moving. Standing still gets you robbed.
I seen worse than you. Doesn't mean I trust you.

npcs.name: Ms. Chen
npcs.voice: Formal. Bureaucratic warmth hiding steel. Never uses slang or praises crime.
fallback_bank: The city runs on structure, not chaos.
Profits come to those who wait.

npcs.name: The Broker
npcs.voice: Cold. Precise. Numbers only. Never shows emotion or discusses crime.

npcs.name: Ghost
npcs.voice: Cryptic. Fragments. Never confirms directly. Never uses full sentences when fragments work.
fallback_bank: Ghost doesn't remember names. Only faces.

npcs.name: Lucky Lou
npcs.voice: Warm surface. Sharp underneath. Never shows he is calculating.
fallback_bank: The house always wins. But you might too.
I like your style. Reminds me of me.
Money comes. Money goes. Friends stay.
Bet what you can lose. That's the rule.
Lady Luck is fickle. But she remembers kindness.

npcs.name: Marco
npcs.voice: Direct. Practical. Respects delivery. Never uses management-speak.
fallback_bank: Talk is cheap. Work is real.
Show up. Do the job. Get paid.
